title.en: If I Am Not for Myself, Who Will Be for Me? — Hillel's Three Questions
title.zh: 若我不为自己,谁将为我?——希勒尔的三个问题
title.he: אם אין אני לי, מי לי? — שלוש השאלות של הלל

author: Torah Light Editorial Team
recommended_reading: The Essential Talmud by Adin Steinsaltz
Letters to a Buddhist Jew by Rabbi Akiva Tatz
Pirkei Avos: A Chassidic Perspective by Rabbi Yitzchak Ginsburgh
Timeless Wisdom: Passages for Meditation from the Jewish Tradition by Eknath Easwaran
online_resources: Aish.com - Pirkei Avos: Timeless Wisdom series
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers with no prior Jewish knowledge
special_features: Modern examples for career, relationships, and Jewish journey
